subcodes.first_line: O esteemed lady! Your letter reached Shoghi Effendi and its contents brought joy, for it was indicative [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانم محترمه نامه شما بشوقی افندی رسید از مضامین سرور حاصل گردید زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @Muhammad; Islam, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
